utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 6 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), and total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes: destination (provided), travel_dates (specific dates provided), transportation (flight details, times, route, passengers, confirmation code, and cost provided), accommodation (hotel, room types, dates, duration, confirmation code, and cost provided), activities (three activities with dates/times/confirmation codes and costs plus a total activities cost provided), additional_services (restaurant recommendations with allergy note and cost provided), and total_budget (breakdown with flights, accommodation, activities, total spent, original budget, remaining budget provided). All items are fully specified according to the requested details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Match each item from the final package to the closest named option in the ground-truth ratings. Destination 'Barcelona, Spain' maps to the 'Barcelona, Spain' destination rating. Transportation says 'Budget Airlines Economy Class' which corresponds to transportation.budget_airlines.Economy Class. Accommodation 'Family Haven Hotel Barcelona' corresponds to accommodation 'Family Haven Hotel'. Activities: 'Club de Golf Barcelona for 2 adults' aligns with activities 'Golf Day'; 'City Walking Tour for 4 people' aligns with activities 'City Walking Tour'; 'Museum Day Pass' aligns with activities 'Museum Day Pass'. Restaurant recommendations include 'Organic Farm-to-Table' and 'Mediterranean Bistro'; only 'Organic Farm-to-Table' exists in ratings; 'Mediterranean Bistro' has no direct match and is omitted.
